tunnelVision.title: Tunnel Vision Effect
tunnelVision.content: High-stress state detected. Your brain automatically filtered out visual signals from non-habitual locations. You didn't fail to see it — your brain "edited it out" of the image.

camouflage.title: Camouflage Warning (Visual Mimicry)
camouflage.content: The item's color is causing spectral fusion with the environment. Simply put, it blends in — becoming "camouflage." Under current lighting, human eye detection rate drops to 15%. A reverse visual scan is required.

memoryDeception.title: Memory Deception Effect
memoryDeception.content: In autopilot mode, the memory system experienced a "temporal displacement." The item is often not where you "remember" placing it, but at the exact moment your action was interrupted.

primary.title: Primary Suspect Zone: Gravity Sink Point
primary.hint: The 90% probability zone following physics laws — easily overlooked...

secondary.title: Secondary Suspect Zone: Visual Blind Spot
secondary.hint: Located in habitual dead angles below eye level...

auxiliary.title: Auxiliary Zone: Social Transfer Point
auxiliary.hint: Locations where others may have unconsciously moved it...

lightInsights.dawn_morning: ☀️ AI Analysis: Morning light is clear and cool. If the item is in an open area, it should be relatively easy to spot.
lightInsights.noon_afternoon: ☀️ AI Analysis: Strong light can create shadows. Check the shaded sides of objects and areas in shadow.
lightInsights.dusk: 🌇 AI Analysis: Rapidly changing light reduces eye adaptation. Items easily slip into visual blind spots — focus on transition areas.
lightInsights.night: 🌑 AI Analysis: Low visibility. If lights were off, check floor-level gaps, under furniture, and low corners.

home.heroSubtitle: CogniSeek uses behavioral psychology, space-time reconstruction, and AI cognition to help you narrow down your item's most likely location in minutes.

home.featuresSubtitle: Six-dimensional analysis combining psychology, physics, and AI to trace what your memory missed.

psychology.title: Behavioral Psychology
psychology.desc: Analyzes your mental state and action habits to reconstruct unconscious behaviors during the loss event.

spatial.title: Spatial Probability
spatial.desc: Maps your movement path and calculates probability distributions for each area using spatial algorithms.

temporal.title: Time-Space Reconstruction
temporal.desc: Rebuilds the temporal window of the loss using memory entropy and multi-dimensional time cues.

vision.title: Visual Blind Spot Analysis
vision.desc: Detects cognitive visual blind spots that cause people to look right at an object without seeing it.

entropy.title: Chaos Entropy Engine
entropy.desc: Quantifies the degree of disorder in your state and environment to prioritize search zones.

instant.title: Instant AI Report
instant.desc: Generates a personalized tactical search plan in seconds, with step-by-step micro-action guidance.

home.howSubtitle: Complete 6 steps in under 3 minutes for a precision AI analysis.

1.title: Describe the Item
1.desc: Tell us what you lost — type, color, and features.

2.title: Set the Timeline
2.desc: When did you last have it? Lock the time window.

3.title: Map the Location
3.desc: Pinpoint where you were and the areas you visited.

4.title: Recall Your State
4.desc: Describe your mood and activities at the time.

5.title: Report Prior Searches
5.desc: Tell us where you've already looked — and haven't.

6.title: Get Your AI Report
6.desc: Receive a precision recovery plan with tactical actions.

1.text: I searched everywhere for 40 minutes. CogniSeek pointed me to the seat rail gap I'd never think to check — found my AirPods in 2 minutes.
1.name: Alex R.

2.text: The psychological analysis was uncanny. It knew I was rushed and suggested the jacket pocket I threw on a chair. There it was.
2.name: Sarah M.

3.text: My cat went missing. The spatial probability map highlighted the exact closet corner. Opened it and she was there.
3.name: Jordan L.

home.ctaBannerSubtitle: Let AI reconstruct the moment and tell you exactly where to look.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what information CogniSeek collects, how it is used, and how we protect it when you use our AI-powered item recovery service.

overview.heading: 1. Overview
body: CogniSeek provides AI-assisted probability analysis to help users locate lost items or pets.
By using the service, you acknowledge that the platform processes the information you submit in order to generate analysis reports, manage your account, and deliver paid features.

dataWeCollect.heading: 2. Information We Collect
body: We collect account data such as your email address and authentication provider when you sign in.
We also collect the search information you submit, including item details, locations, time clues, behavioral context, and report history necessary to generate and restore your analysis results.

howWeUseData.heading: 3. How We Use Information
body: We use your information to generate AI reports, restore your historical reports, improve service reliability, prevent abuse, and provide support.
We do not sell your personal information. Data is used only for service delivery, internal operations, analytics, fraud prevention, and legal compliance.

payments.heading: 4. Payments
body: Payments are processed by third-party payment providers and Merchant of Record partners. CogniSeek does not store your full card number or full payment instrument details on its own servers.
Payment-related identifiers, order status, one-time purchase entitlement, and access status may be stored to provide purchased features and resolve billing issues.

storage.heading: 5. Data Storage and Security
body: Your account and report data are stored using our infrastructure providers and database services with access controls designed to protect user information.
While we apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards, no online service can guarantee absolute security.

sharing.heading: 6. When We Share Data
body: We may share limited information with infrastructure, authentication, analytics, AI inference, and payment providers only where necessary to operate the service.
We may also disclose information when required by law, to protect rights and safety, or in connection with a business transfer.

yourRights.heading: 7. Your Rights and Choices
body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your account-related personal data, subject to legal and operational limitations.
You may also contact us if you want your stored reports removed or if you have questions about how your data is handled.

children.heading: 8. Children
body: CogniSeek is not intended for children under the age required by applicable law to consent to digital services in their region.
If you believe a child has submitted personal data without proper authorization, please contact us so we can review and remove the information where appropriate.

changes.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect product, legal, or operational changes.
When material changes are made, we will update this page and revise the policy content accordingly.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms govern your access to and use of CogniSeek, including free analysis features, paid premium reports, and account-based history restoration.

serviceDescription.heading: 1. Service Description
body: CogniSeek provides AI-generated, probability-based guidance intended to assist users in searching for lost items or pets.
The service is informational in nature and does not guarantee recovery, accuracy, or any specific real-world outcome.

eligibility.heading: 2. Eligibility
body: You must use CogniSeek in compliance with applicable laws and provide truthful information when creating an account or purchasing premium features.
If you are using the service on behalf of a business or organization, you represent that you have authority to bind that entity.

accounts.heading: 3. Accounts
body: Some parts of the service require sign-in through supported authentication providers.
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for activities that occur under your account.

acceptableUse.heading: 4. Acceptable Use
body: You may not use the service for unlawful, harmful, deceptive, abusive, or fraudulent purposes.
You may not attempt to interfere with the platform, reverse engineer protected parts of the service, bypass access controls, or exploit payment logic.

aiOutputs.heading: 5. AI Outputs and Disclaimers
body: AI outputs are generated from user-provided context and model inference. They may be incomplete, inaccurate, or unsuitable for your situation.
You should not rely on CogniSeek output as the sole factual basis or sole decision-making basis for important actions.
CogniSeek is not a replacement for law enforcement, emergency response, veterinary care, insurance advice, or professional investigation services.

billing.heading: 6. Billing
body: Certain premium features require payment before access is granted. The current premium unlock is sold as a one-time digital purchase and the final price is shown at checkout.
By completing a purchase, you authorize the applicable charge and agree that access to paid digital features may begin immediately after payment confirmation.

subscriptions.heading: 7. Access After Purchase
body: The current premium unlock is not sold as a recurring subscription and does not auto-renew.
Access may be suspended or revoked if payment is reversed, refunded, disputed, or determined to be fraudulent.

intellectualProperty.heading: 8. Intellectual Property
body: The CogniSeek brand, interface, prompts, software, and service design are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
You may use your purchased reports for personal or internal use, but you may not resell or reproduce the platform as a competing service.

termination.heading: 9. Suspension or Termination
body: We may suspend or terminate access if you violate these Terms, abuse the service, create platform risk, or if continued access is not commercially or legally feasible.
You may stop using the service at any time.

liability.heading: 10. Limitation of Liability
body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CogniSeek is provided on an as-is and as-available basis without warranties of any kind.
We are not liable for indirect, incidental, consequential, special, or punitive damages arising from your use of the service or reliance on AI-generated outputs.

changes.heading: 11. Changes to These Terms
body: We may update these Terms as the product, pricing model, legal requirements, or operational practices evolve.
Your continued use of the service after updates take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: This policy explains how CogniSeek handles refunds for one-time digital premium analysis purchases.

digitalService.heading: 1. Digital Service Nature
body: CogniSeek sells digital analysis and premium access delivered electronically after payment confirmation.
Because delivery can begin immediately, refund eligibility may be limited once premium content has been unlocked or consumed.

eligibility.heading: 2. When Refunds May Be Considered
body: We may review refund requests in cases such as duplicate charges, clear billing errors, technical failures that prevented delivery of the purchased feature, or successful payment where premium access was not properly delivered.
Requests must include the purchase email, order details, and a description of the issue.

nonRefundable.heading: 3. Non-Refundable Situations
body: Refunds are generally not provided for dissatisfaction with probability-based AI results, successful delivery of unlocked premium content, or failure to recover the item after using the report.
Refunds may also be denied where misuse, abuse, chargeback manipulation, or policy violations are involved.

duplicateCharges.heading: 4. Duplicate or Incorrect Charges
body: If you believe you were charged more than once or billed incorrectly, contact us promptly so we can investigate.
If confirmed, the duplicate or incorrect portion will be refunded through the original payment method where available.

subscriptionCancellation.heading: 5. No Recurring Subscription
body: The current premium unlock is sold as a one-time digital purchase and does not renew automatically.
If CogniSeek introduces recurring plans in the future, their renewal and cancellation terms will be disclosed separately before purchase.

howToRequest.heading: 6. How to Request a Refund
body: Send your refund or billing support request to our contact email using the same email address associated with your purchase whenever possible.
We may ask for additional information to verify the transaction and assess eligibility.

responseTime.heading: 7. Review Time
body: We aim to review billing and refund requests within a reasonable timeframe, typically within 3 to 7 business days.
Approved refunds are returned via the original payment channel, subject to payment processor timing.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you need help with billing, account access, privacy requests, or product support, contact the CogniSeek team using the details below. For standard support requests, we typically respond within 3 to 5 business days, while some billing or refund reviews may take 3 to 7 business days.

merchantCard.title: Seller & billing information
merchantCard.deliveryValue: Premium content is delivered to the currently signed-in account after payment confirmation

merchantInfo.heading: 1. Merchant and Service Information
body: Service name: CogniSeek. Service type: AI-powered digital analysis service designed to help users organize clues and generate lost-item search reports.

The current premium unlock is a one-time digital purchase, not an auto-renewing subscription. After payment confirmation, premium content is delivered to the account currently signed in during purchase.

support.heading: 2. Product and Account Support
body: Contact us if you have issues signing in, restoring reports, accessing premium content, or using the service.
Please include the email address associated with your account and a clear description of the problem so we can assist faster.

billing.heading: 3. Billing Questions
body: For payment, refund, duplicate charge, or checkout-related questions, contact support with your purchase details.
Include the payment email, approximate purchase time, and any relevant order information if available.

privacy.heading: 4. Privacy Requests
body: If you want to request access to or deletion of your stored account data or reports, contact us by email.
We may need to verify your identity before processing privacy-related requests.

responseTime.heading: 5. Response Time
body: We aim to respond to support inquiries as soon as reasonably possible.
Complex billing, fraud, or privacy issues may require additional verification time before final resolution.
